title: Overgrown
description: The Find Overgrown is a Minecraft Resourcepack focused on the cozy warmth of a very cubic world. There is a lot of focus on wood and gold textures in this pack.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b70d30060864f82be3102914f133ba1ce0e7b205_0.webp)

## ABOUT 
**Hello!** TheFind Overgrown is a Resourcepack that sprouted from a project called TheFind. TheFind was one of the first packs I put my heart into after deep diving into Minecraft mods back in 2013. As time passed life got busy and it felt like dust was building on my work. I decided to embrace the dust on my passion project and created its new evolution, TheFind Overgrown. I want the visuals to remind me of the way I felt when I first booted it up so many years ago. 

This resource pack goes great with survival or adventure gameplay depending on your taste. Also the GUI has been overhauled with an all-new Overgorwn style I'm sure you will enjoy! For everyone who liked the original version of TheFind ive tried my best to keep the heart and soul of it! With all the amazing mods out there now the optimal experience uses shaders like Complimentary and the Fusion mod for connected textures! I hope you get the same nostalgic kick using this resource pack as I do! Here's to many beutiful adventures!

## FEATURES
- Vibrant Warm Colors
- Dark Overgrown UI
- Fun Square & Spiral Theme
- Designer For Use with Shaders
- 3D Models
## THANK YOU!
![Notice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd7917fbbc8d340734b4dcdf53107684909e53fd.png)
